places.name: Giraffe Manor
places.description: Just outside of Nairobi lies a large estate surrounded by endangered Rothschild giraffes, who have been fed from the window by Mick Jagger and Walter Cronkite.

places.name: Nairobi Animal Orphanage
places.description: Located in Nairobi National Park, this animal orphanage is the oldest of its kind in Kenya.

places.name: Giraffe Centre
places.description: Get tall with nature's lankiest beasts and their warthog friends at this Kenyan preserve.

places.name: Carnivore Restaurant
places.description: Kenyan restaurant is a carnivore's paradise, serving exotic meats at its ultimate 'Beast of a Feast.'

places.name: Kitengela Glass
places.description: A glass and sculpture wonderland forms an oasis in a remote part of Kenya.

places.name: Bomas of Kenya
places.description: This tourist village in Nairobi celebrates the traditional lifestyles and customs of Kenyan tribes.

places.name: Nairobi Railway Museum
places.description: Strolling through these vintage locomotives offers a surprising amount of insight into the history of Kenya.

places.name: Embark Restaurant
places.description: Farm-to-table East African-European cuisine is on the menu here.
